name: Brownie Peanut Butter Cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Follow directions on box for oil, egg, and water.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Line the 12 muffin cups with paper baking cups.
3. In a large bowl, combine brownie mix, water, oil, and eggs.
4. Fill prepared muffin cups about 2/3 full.
5. Press an unwrapped Reeses Miniature into the batter until the top edge of the candy is even with the batter.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30-35 minutes or until the brownies are set. Do not overbake. Cool in the muffin tin.
7. Makes 12 cupcakes.
8. If using a smaller amount of brownie mix, follow directions on the box, but you may end up with fewer than 12 muffins.
